creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Our builders have been upgraded:

docs-builder  gohugo-0.125.6_2,1 --> gohugo-0.133.0,1
www-builder   gohugo-0.115.4,1   --> gohugo-0.133.0,1

And this issue has finally been properly fixed. I hope this latest Hugo update doesn't encounter any further issues. =) Thank you for reporting this; your vigilance helps us improve.
